steps.title: Locate the reason for worry
steps.content: The passage states ecologists are worried because “its growth is declining.” This is the key signal: growth has slowed compared to before.

steps.title: Match the answer to the declining growth
steps.content: A directly expresses this: “isn't growing at the same rate it used to” states what declining growth means. B, C, and D cite different causes (production failure, fence obstacles, root limits) that the passage never mentions. That confirms A is correct.
